## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Best week yet for website clicks (86) and impressions; 10 new articles published, totaling 109](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [New content strategy focusing on top-of-funnel topics, listicles, and pain points to boost visibility and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content opportunities, including a potential directory of industry professionals](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Ongoing efforts to optimize for AI search tools like Perplexity and ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Last week: 86 clicks, significant improvement from 49-50 in early December](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Best week for impressions so far](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [10 new articles published, bringing total to 109](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Top performing article: "Top 5 AI tools to automate follow-up emails" (\~50% of clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)

### New Content Strategy

  - [8 new clusters with 17 new topics identified](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Focus shift to top-of-funnel, popular topics, and listicles](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Aim: Address pain points, increase visibility, and establish thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [New "alternatives to" cluster for competitor comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Email automation/follow-ups cluster to build on successful topic](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Competitor Comparison Pages

  - [Current pages for Gong and Fathom comparisons exist](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Strategy: Highlight Attention's strengths without directly bashing competitors](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Potential for SEO optimization on existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [200 integration pages created programmatically with AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Primary purpose: Showcase wide integration capabilities on main landing page](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Potential for SEO optimization by adding fields and restructuring pages](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [Consider generalizing content (e.g., "How to get Zoom call reporting into Salesforce/HubSpot")](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Programmatic Content Opportunities

  - [Proposed: Directory of industry professionals (similar to "Go to Market" on LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Would include data like LinkedIn followers, job roles, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Requires workflow development, potentially using GrowthX's evolving API-based system](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### AI Search Optimization

  - [Factors influencing AI search results: diverse online presence, review sites, organic search performance](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Importance of consistent appearance across various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Consider creating AI overviews and focusing on credibility factors (e.g., citing sources, in-depth testing)](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stewart to review and approve new content topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Andrej to send list of factors for ranking in AI search results (Perplexity, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Stewart to provide spreadsheet of industry professionals for potential directory project](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore feasibility of creating workflow for directory content generation](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Andrej to confirm with CTO regarding crawler concerns (Chatsky, Claw JS)](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Team to ramp up content production in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LQgquRQPzApFiXCB4AsHv25Ex7JdKA1z?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
